daffas_arsenal.ammo.acp45.desc: Designed for Dual .45 ACP guns T_T.

daffas_arsenal.ammo.daffas_40mm.name: JAKMAN 40mm
daffas_arsenal.ammo.elektrikal.desc: A single use battery designed to provide temporary power to the device, intended for emergency or disposable applications.
daffas_arsenal.ammo.elektrikal.name: Daffa's Phone Battery
daffas_arsenal.ammo.water.desc: §bMade from extract of Potato.... Water is a clear, tasteless, and odorless liquid essential to life. Covering over 70% of Earth’s surface, it exists in oceans, rivers, lakes, and even underground. Composed of two hydrogen atoms bonded to one oxygen atom (H₂O), water is unique in its ability to exist naturally in solid, liquid, and gas states. It’s vital for all living organisms, supporting bodily functions, nourishing plants, and maintaining ecosystems. Water also plays a crucial role in weather patterns, shaping landscapes through erosion, and providing a habitat for countless species. Clean, accessible water is essential for health, agriculture, and industry, making it one of our most precious resources.§r
daffas_arsenal.ammo.water.name: Daffa's Water
daffas_arsenal.attachment.knife_skill.de: Faster melee attack for P99 and HAK
daffas_arsenal.attachment.makten_stock.d: Reduce recoil greatly but slow aiming
daffas_arsenal.attachment.mgup1.desc: Faster fire rate and increase recoil
daffas_arsenal.attachment.mgup1.name: MG3 Rapid Cycle
daffas_arsenal.attachment.mgup2.desc: Reduce fire rate and decrease recoil
daffas_arsenal.attachment.mgup2.name: MG3 Heavy Buffer
daffas_arsenal.attachment.muzzle_silence: Why is it called a silencer if it doesn’t completely get rid of the sound? 💀
daffas_arsenal.creativetab.title: Daffa's Arsenal
daffas_arsenal.gun.ak47.desc: TAK TAK TAK TAK DUNG TAK DUNG TAK TAK DUNG TAK DUNG TAK DUNG TAK DUNG TAK DUNG TAK DUNG TAK
daffas_arsenal.gun.aksopmod.desc: A modernized AK with rails and optics. Reliable, powerful, and adaptable for any fight.
daffas_arsenal.gun.apacoba9.desc: A lightweight, 9mm submachine gun designed for CQB combat. Features low recoil, and modular customization. Ideal for fast, precise firefights in close quarters.
daffas_arsenal.gun.apacoba9_sup.desc: A lightweight, 9mm submachine gun designed for CQB combat. Features low recoil, and modular customization. Ideal for fast, precise firefights in close quarters.
daffas_arsenal.gun.g36.desc: Light machine gun variant of the G36, built for sustained 5.56 suppressive fire.
daffas_arsenal.gun.g36c.desc: Most popular gun in entertainment media... i think.
daffas_arsenal.gun.g36c_commando.desc: The regular one but with Foregrip.
daffas_arsenal.gun.gerosa.desc: A compact Russian bullpup rifle from the 1990s, usually chambered in 9×39mm. Designed for close-quarters combat.
daffas_arsenal.gun.harpa9.desc: The ARP9 is a versatile, lightweight rifle designed for exceptional performance in 9mm with excellent CQB capability.
daffas_arsenal.gun.hk416.desc: The HK416 is a reliable, accurate assault rifle with a high fire rate, perfect for rapid engagements.
daffas_arsenal.gun.hk416_sup.desc: The HK416 is a reliable, accurate assault rifle with a high fire rate, perfect for rapid engagements.
daffas_arsenal.gun.hk417.desc: The HK417 is a powerful, accurate battle rifle with a strong punch, ideal for medium to long range engagements.
daffas_arsenal.gun.hk45.desc: The HK45 is a reliable and versatile handgun known for its exceptional accuracy and superior handling. Chambered in .45 ACP.
daffas_arsenal.gun.hk45_sup.desc: The HK45 is a reliable and versatile handgun known for its exceptional accuracy and superior handling. Chambered in .45 ACP.
daffas_arsenal.gun.m79.desc: A classic, single shot 40mm grenade launcher. One round, One big boom .
daffas_arsenal.gun.m79sohrt.desc: Faster reloading, poor accuracy and velocity.
daffas_arsenal.gun.makten_single.desc: The MAC10 is a small, fast firing submachine gun from the 1960s, made for close range use.
Tactical version of MAC10, feel free to customize it!.
daffas_arsenal.gun.p99_hak.desc: P99 with a concealed HideAway knife. Fast, versatile, and built for seamless transition between ranged fire and close quarters stealth.
daffas_arsenal.gun.p99_nohak.desc: The P99 compact 9×19mm striker fired pistol. ergonomic polymer frame, crisp trigger, reliable for duty or sport.
daffas_arsenal.gun.sg550.desc: The SG550 is a precise assault rifle with stable recoil, ensuring accuracy in mid to long range engagements.
daffas_arsenal.gun.sgputer.desc: Winchester Model 1887 is a classic lever action shotgun introduced in 1887, known for its iconic large lever and old west style.
daffas_arsenal.gun.sgputer2.desc: Faster reload, poor accuracy and velocity.
daffas_arsenal.gun.sl8.desc: Sniper version of G36. High damage for piercing an armored entity.
daffas_arsenal.gun.southeastmomssecretwe: The Folding Hanger is a practical and space saving solution for organizing clothes. Designed with a collapsible frame when not in use.
The Folding Hanger offers a smart, compact way to keep your clothes tidy. Its collapsible design allows for easy storage when not in use.
A durable, space saving hanger with a folding frame. Easy to store, always ready for duty.
daffas_arsenal.gun.spasi15.desc: The SPAS 15 is a 12 gauge Italian combat shotgun with semi auto and pump action modes. It uses a detachable magazine and has a folding stock, ideal tactical use.
daffas_arsenal.gun.ss1_v2.desc: The SS1-V2 is a reliable assault rifle, offering solid performance in both close quarters and medium range engagements.
daffas_arsenal.gun.ss1_v5.desc: The SS1-R5 is a reliable assault rifle with excellent CQB capability, ideal for close quarters combat.
daffas_arsenal.gun.ss1_v5g.desc:
Bringing back the first version of the SS1-V5, but gold... 
§eDaffa's Arsenal 1st Anniversary
daffas_arsenal.gun.ssg69.desc: The SSG69 is a precision bolt action rifle renowned for its accuracy and reliability. Chambered in .30 06 Springfield.
daffas_arsenal.gun.ssg69s.desc: When your bone broke ahh SSG 69 §6(Faster Rechamber)§f.
daffas_arsenal.gun.taurus.desc: You might need this to hunt big monster. 💀💀💀
daffas_arsenal.gun.uji.desc: Forever gangsta, born n’ die gangsta...... uhh okay?.
daffas_arsenal.gun.wawan2000.desc: Type1 version has lower recoil but does not support muzzle attachments.
daffas_arsenal.gun.wawan20002.desc: Type2 version has higher recoil but supports muzzle customization.
pack.daffas_arsenal.name: Daffa's Arsenal
